children.heading: Requirements suspended
children.label: a Requirements suspended
children.text: The provisions of specified in subsection (b) shall not apply to a servicemember’s claims or interests in claims, regularly located and recorded, during a period of military service and 180 days thereafter, or during any period of hospitalization or rehabilitation due to injuries or disabilities incurred in the line of duty.section 28 of title 30

children.heading: Requirements
children.label: b Requirements
children.text: The provisions in that shall not apply under subsection (a) are those which require that on each mining claim located after , and until a patent has been issued for such claim, not less than $100 worth of labor shall be performed or improvements made during each year.section 28 of title 30May 10, 1872

children.heading: Period of protection from forfeiture
children.label: c Period of protection from forfeiture
children.text: A mining claim or an interest in a claim owned by a servicemember that has been regularly located and recorded shall not be subject to forfeiture for nonperformance of annual assessments during the period of military service and for 180 days thereafter, or for any period of hospitalization or rehabilitation described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Filing requirement
children.label: d Filing requirement
children.text: In order to obtain the protections of this section, the claimant of a mining location shall, before the end of the assessment year in which military service is begun or within 60 days after the end of such assessment year, cause to be filed in the office where the location notice or certificate is recorded a notice communicating the fact of military service and the desire to hold the mining claim under this section.
